Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2003 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim For Minorn Request For Notice
Off Calendar Dec-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise/ Compromise of Incompetent Person hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Janet Pond.
Appearances:
Adrian G. Driscoll, Esq. for Petitioner: David Ginesi present as guardian ad litem for Steven Ginesi, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
No fees.
A net balance of $10,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 955 El Camino Real, South San Francisco, CA. until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in court.
